name: Marilyn's Concoction
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe bowl, melt the chocolate on HIGH for 1-2 minutes, or until melted, stirring every 30 seconds.
2. Add peanut butter chips to the melted chocolate and stir well.
3. Line a loaf pan with waxed paper.
4. Pour a thin layer of the chocolate mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Arrange marshmallows in a single layer over the chocolate.
6. Pour any remaining chocolate/peanut butter chip mixture over the marshmallows.
7. Sprinkle chopped walnuts on top, pressing gently to ensure they are evenly distributed (some may fall through).
8. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
9. Remove from the refrigerator and carefully lift off the waxed paper.
10. Cut into slices—not too thin—and then cut each slice in half.
